Package net.sf.jailer.database

Klasse BasicDataSource.DriverShim

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.database.BasicDataSource.DriverShim
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Driver
Umschließende Klasse:

public static class BasicDataSource.DriverShim extends Object implements Driver
Wraps a Jdbc-Driver.
